description: Focused 35-45s clip of the AI ToDo applet: open ToDo, create a list if first-run, add two tasks, show them in the list, return to home.

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: Stay on top of what needs doing.

scenes.name: Tap AI ToDo
scenes.narration: AI ToDo gives you a clean list to organize your day.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap AI ToDo to open your tasks.

scenes.name: Create first list if first-run
scenes.narration: Lists let you group related tasks. Start with one.

scenes.name: Tap the plus to add a task
scenes.narration: Tap the plus button to add a new task.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Add tasks with the plus button up top.

scenes.name: Type the task
scenes.narration: Type what you need to do - it saves automatically.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Type your task - it saves automatically as you go.

scenes.name: Add a second task
scenes.narration: Add as many as you need - same simple flow.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Add as many tasks as you need.

scenes.name: Show the list
scenes.narration: Everything you typed is right there, synced across your devices.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Your tasks live in one tidy list.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
